# whenUserSignsOut

**Instance Method**

Returns an object representing a deferred or asynchronous operation that resolves when the user signs out.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<Undefined, CloudKit.CKError> whenUserSignsOut();
```

## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to `Undefined` when the user signs out, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Container/whenUserSignsOut] method to call a function when the user signs out.

```javascript
myContainer.whenUserSignsOut().then(function() {
    // The user signed out
});
```

## Authenticating Users

- **setUpAuth**: Determines whether a user is signed in and presents an appropriate sign in or sign out button.
- **whenUserSignsIn**: Returns an object representing a deferred or asynchronous operation that resolves when the user signs in.
